# Claude Agents Pack

Canonical docs index for LLM/GEO discovery.

Site: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/
Repository: https://github.com/shahboura/agents-claude
Full index: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/llms-full.txt

## Core Pages
- Home: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/
- Getting Started: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/getting-started
- Agents: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/agents/README
- Commands & Skills: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/commands
- Instructions: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/instructions
- Customization: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/customization
- Troubleshooting: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/troubleshooting
- Skills Matrix: https://shahboura.github.io/agents-claude/skills-matrix
